scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server,mcp -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w mcp-server"
scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w mcp-server && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const t=JSON.stringify({buildTime:new Date().toISOString()});fs.writeFileSync('dist/buildTime.json',t);fs.writeFileSync('dist/mcp-server/buildTime.json',t);fs.copyFileSync('mcp-server/src/descriptions.json','dist/mcp-server/descriptions.json')"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run pm2:start
